title: Bitfarms Reports First Quarter 2024 Results
text: Bitfarms reported Q1 2024 revenue of $50 million, up 9% quarter-over-quarter and 67% year-over-year. Gross mining margin reached 59%, a significant improvement from 52% in prior quarter and 41% in Q1 2023. Adjusted EBITDA was $21 million representing 42% margin, up from $14 million in Q4 2023. Net loss was $6 million or ($0.02) per share. Direct cost per BTC was $20,500 compared to $12,500 in Q1 2023. Company produced 943 BTC during the quarter, averaging 10.4 BTC daily. Current hashrate reached 7.0 EH/s, up from 6.5 EH/s at year-end. Management stated they are on track to achieve guidance of 21 EH/s and 21 w/TH in 2024, representing projected 223% hashrate increase and 40% efficiency improvement year-over-year. Company secured 51,908 additional miners for H2 2024 deployment. Doubled Paraguay power capacity from 100 MW to 200 MW. Received $24 million VAT refund confirmation from Canadian authorities.
